joinToAct.heading: Join to take part
joinToAct.body: Sign in to reserve, ask a question or add your own things. Enter your email and we'll send you a magic link — no password, no sign-up form.
joinToAct.bodyNamed: Sign in to reserve, ask a question or add your own things to {{collection}}. Enter your email and we'll send you a magic link — no password, no sign-up form.
joinToAct.sentBody: We've sent you a magic link to join. Open it on this device to start taking part.
joinToAct.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
joinToAct.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

visibility.publicHelper: Anyone with the link can view it and join to take part. Turn off to keep it invite-only.

common.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts — please wait a moment and try again.

login.title: OIUEEI
login.magicLinkSent: If this email is registered, your magic link is on its way — check your inbox, and your spam folder just in case.
login.pitch: Share what you have with the people you trust — no ads, no strangers.
login.description: What is OIUEEI? An open-source web application for people to share their belongings with friends and others around. Users can create collections (libraries of things, gift lists, items for sale) and share them with friends who can then reserve items or ask questions.
login.openSource: OIUEEI is open source. You can find the project on <1>GitHub</1>. If you would like to request access or collaborate, get in touch.
login.manifesto: No ads, no trackers. Your data is not the product.

popin.title: Come meet us!
popin.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a magic link. One click and you're in — no password, no faff.
popin.magicLinkSent: Magic link sent! Check your inbox and click the link to join.
popin.closeThisTab: You can close this tab now — the link is on its way to your inbox.
popin.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in →

verify.invitationDeclined: Invitation declined. The collection owner has been notified.
verify.expiredHelp: If your link has expired, ask the person who invited you to send a new one, or request a new magic link.

home.noThings: No things yet. Add things to your collections to see them here.
home.offlineBody: We can't reach OIUEEI right now. Check your connection and try again.
home.loadErrorBody: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.

home.bookingUnavailableBody: {{thing_headline}} went to someone else this time — things come and go, so keep an eye out!
home.reportedBody: Someone reported “{{thing_headline}}”. Please take a look.

collectionPage.inactiveNotice: This collection is inactive. It is not visible to guests.
collectionPage.welcomeText: Want to know more? Click here!
collectionPage.noThings: No things in this collection yet.
collectionPage.noPermission: You do not have access to this collection. It may be inactive, or your access may have changed — check your invitations, or ask the owner.

thingPage.holdRequested: Hold requested — you’ll hear back soon.
thingPage.noPermission: You do not have permission to view this thing.
thingPage.reportConfirmBody: We'll let the owner know that someone reported it — they won't see who. Only report content that breaks the rules.
thingPage.reportThanks: Thanks — we've let the owner know.
thingPage.reportError: Sorry, we couldn't send your report. Please try again.

thingCard.transferConfirmBody: Accepting this request transfers the item to the person who asked for it. It stays in the collection — you can still follow it in the journey.

request.dateRange: Date must be between today and 90 days from today.
request.successMessage: We've let the owner know — they'll get back to you soon.

upload.pdfTooLarge: The file is too large (max 5 MB).
upload.welcomeDocHelper: Optional. Everyone who joins the group receives it by email, once.

addThing.priceRequired: Price is required for this type.
addThing.maxDescription: Description is too long: 256 characters per language.

deleteCollection.warning: This action cannot be undone. All things in this collection will also be deleted.

editProfile.aboutMarkdownHint: New to Markdown? Write and preview it online for free at <0>dillinger.io</0>. Headings (# Title) work too.
editProfile.languageHelper: OIUEEI also writes to you in this language (emails included).

editCollection.statusHelper: Inactive collections are not visible to guests.
editCollection.digestHelper: Automatically email guests a summary of new things.
editCollection.maxDescription: Description is too long: 256 characters per language.

createCollection.modeProprietaryDesc: Only you can add things to this list.
createCollection.modeCommunityDesc: Everyone you invite can add their own things too.
createCollection.allowedTypesLabel: What can be added to this collection
createCollection.allowedTypesHelper: Pick at least one. Only the types you choose will be available when adding things later.
createCollection.allowedTypesSwapHelper: Swap mode only accepts swap things.
createCollection.allowedTypesShareHelper: Share-only mode only accepts share things.
createCollection.tagsHelper: Optional labels to organise this collection's things
createCollection.maxDescription: Description is too long: 256 characters per language.

welcome.description: OIUEEI is an open-source platform for sharing within trusted communities. Create collections for gifts, sales, loans, swaps and wishes — then invite friends to browse, reserve and interact. Everything stays between people who know each other.
welcome.createShare: OIUEEI revolves around your own collections. Create one for anything you'd like to share — gifts, sales, loans, swaps or wishes — and invite your circles: family, friends, neighbours, your street. Only the people you invite can see it and join in.
welcome.commitmentBody1: OIUEEI runs without ads and without third-party analytics: nobody tracks you while you use it. Your data is not the product — it is never sold or shared with anyone.
welcome.commitmentBody2: The code is open and you can read all of it; this commitment is <1>written into our design rules</1>. It's not the fine print: it's the starting point.
welcome.exampleIntro: To show you how it works, we've shared a few example collections with you. Meet the people below and step into their collections — read on and you'll get the idea.
welcome.exampleIntroEmpty: These stories show the kinds of things people share on OIUEEI.
welcome.personaLalaBody: Off on sabbatical and clearing out the flat with zero fuss — a tenner each, you come collect, everything gone by the 25th. Whatever's left goes straight to the local orphanage.
welcome.personaLeleBody: A hands-on electronics tinkerer and component hoarder — her coliving runs on jumper wires and half-finished Arduinos. Spare Nano or a stray sensor? Pop it on the swap board and propose a trade — no cash, just parts and mutual respect. Resistance is futile!
welcome.personaLiliBody: Her neighbourhood lending library has the lot: drills and steam cleaners, but also kitchen kit, garden gear, sports and baby bits — because nobody should buy what they'll only use once in a blue moon. Borrow it, use it, return it clean. That's the deal.
welcome.personaLoloBody: A plant parent with far too many green babies, giving away succulent cuttings from a beautifully curated collection — echeverias, jades, sedums, the lot. Adopt a pup; the only rule is that you have to name it.
welcome.personaLuluBody: Nobody quite knows where he finds these things or where he goes. His community shelf fills weekly with objects that have lived a life, ready for a new home. Members get a weekly email digest — because what arrives on the shelf on Monday deserves to be gone by Friday.
welcome.enterCta: Enter and see how it works

myBookings.noBookings: You have no booking requests yet.
myBookings.expiredHelper: This request expired automatically because the owner didn't reply within 72 hours (3 days).

removeGuest.warning: This will remove <0>{{name}}</0> from the collection. They will lose access immediately.

leaveCollection.warning: You'll be removed from <0>{{headline}}</0> and lose access to it, unless the owner invites you again.

userPage.noShared: No one has shared a collection with you yet.

wishes.respondingWithListing: You're posting a listing to answer a wish.
wishes.acceptConfirmBody: The person who answered will be told you accepted their offer. Other answers stay open.
wishes.resolveConfirmBody: It leaves the active board (you can reopen it later). If you accepted an answer, that person gets a thank-you.

swap.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one item to offer.
swap.noItemsToOffer: You have no items to offer in this collection.
swap.swapAccepted: Swap completed! Items have been exchanged.
swap.requireMinimumHelper: Guests (and you) must upload at least 3 of your own items to this collection before being allowed to propose a swap.

swap.minimumNotMetBody_other: Upload {{count}} more items to this collection before you can propose a swap.

share.pageDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a magic link to join the collection. One click and you're in.
share.magicLinkSent: Magic link sent! Check your inbox and click the link to join the collection.
share.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in →

endless.label: Endless — multiple people can hold at the same time, thing stays active forever

notifications.intro: Choose which emails you'd like to receive from OIUEEI. You can change this at any time.
notifications.magicHelper: Required — without these you cannot sign in or join collections.
notifications.activityHelper: Booking requests, confirmations, questions and answers, reminders.
notifications.newsHelper: Collection broadcasts, weekly digests and newsletters.
notifications.invalidLink: This link is invalid or has expired. Please sign in to change your preferences.

pause.sectionHelper: While paused, the collection is visible but guests cannot place new hold requests.
pause.messageHelper: Let guests know why the collection is paused. Maximum 256 characters.
pause.messageRequiredHint: Add a message for your guests before you can pause the collection.

shareMenu.label: Share collection
shareMenu.emailSubject: I'm inviting you to {{headline}} on OIUEEI
shareMenu.whatsappText: I'm inviting you to "{{headline}}" on OIUEEI: {{url}}
shareMenu.copyError: We couldn't copy the link. Try again or use one of the other options.
shareMenu.linkError: We couldn't generate the invite link. Please try again.
shareMenu.qrHelper: Point a phone camera at this code to open the invite link.
shareMenu.rotateBody: A fresh link is created and the current one stops working — anyone you've already shared it with will need the new link.
shareMenu.revokeBody: The invite link stops working for everyone. People already in the collection keep their access; no one new can join with the old link.
shareMenu.rotated: New link created — the old one no longer works.
shareMenu.revoked: Sharing stopped — the link no longer works.

bulkAdd.heading: Add many at once (CSV)
bulkAdd.help: Add multiple things from a CSV — or a ZIP with the photos included.
bulkAdd.formatIntro: Upload a CSV with a "headline" column (required). Optional columns: type, description, fee, availability, location, condition, tags (separate multiple tags with |). To add photos, upload a ZIP with the CSV plus the image files and reference each photo by filename in a "photo" column.
bulkAdd.empty: No rows found in that file.
bulkAdd.tooMany: You can import up to {{max}} items at once.
bulkAdd.parseError: We couldn't read that CSV. Check the format and try again.
bulkAdd.error: Some rows couldn't be imported. Check the file and try again.
bulkAdd.rowErrors: These rows couldn't be imported (check their columns): {{rows}}
bulkAdd.zipNoCsv: The ZIP must contain a CSV file.
bulkAdd.zipMissingImages: These photos are named in the CSV but missing from the ZIP: {{files}}
bulkAdd.zipError: We couldn't read that ZIP. Check the file and try again.
bulkAdd.imageUploadError: Some photos couldn't be uploaded. Check the images and try again.
bulkAdd.formatBody: Tags go in one cell separated by | (and must be defined in the collection). For photos, zip the CSV together with the image files and name each photo in the "photo" column — like this:

tags.tooLong: One label is over {{limit}} characters (per language).

rental.durationsHelper: For lending/renting items. Renters pick one of these. Empty = any length.
rental.weekdaysHelper: Both pickup and return must fall on these days. Empty = any day.

collectionLanguage.label: Language of the group messages
collectionLanguage.helper: The language the group's emails are written in. Any member who has set their own language reads them in theirs.

localized.hint: Bilingual group? You can write one text per language.
localized.tagsHint: Tags can hold one label per language too.
localized.infoBody: If your group reads in two languages, write the title or the description as a small map — copy this and change the words. Everyone then reads it in their own language, in the app and in their emails.
localized.tagsInfoBody: A tag label works the same way — write it as a map and each member sees their own.
localized.infoFallback: Languages: es (Spanish), ca (Catalan), en (English). Write in one only if you prefer — anything that isn't a map is shown exactly as you typed it.
